title: ICARION Domain Geometry Configuration
description: Geometric description of instrument domain in global coordinates

origin_m.description: Domain origin (x, y, z) in meters, global coordinate system

length_m.description: Axial length of the domain in meters

acc_length_m.description: Acceleration section length for TOF-like instruments [m]

radius_in_m.description: Inner electrode radius at z=0 for Orbitrap hyperlogarithmic geometry [m]. Defines inner boundary of z²=0.5(r²-R²)+R_m²ln(R/r)

radius_out_m.description: Outer electrode radius at z=0 for Orbitrap hyperlogarithmic geometry [m]. Defines outer boundary of z²=0.5(r²-R²)+R_m²ln(R/r)

radius_char_m.description: Characteristic radius R_m for Orbitrap quadro-logarithmic potential [m]. Determines field curvature. Must satisfy R_m > radius_out_m for physical validity (Makarov 2000)

end_aperture_m.description: End aperture radius for TOF instruments [m]
